_publications._publicationTitle: Natural history of meningioma development in mice reveals: a synergy of Nf2 and p16(Ink4a) mutations.

_contextSnippet: adCre;Nf2 flox2/flox2 (9 of 72 histologically examined mice; 13%) mice... adCre;Nf2 flox2/flox2 ;Ink4a*/* (10 of 27 histologically examined mice; 37%)
details: Successfully induced meningioma development in 13% of Nf2 flox2/flox2 mice and 37% of Nf2 flox2/flox2;Ink4a*/* mice
